text: 100g of fat. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for this category, the real question is fat quality.
0g of carbs. outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet. not relevant here.
0g of protein. everything else is kind of whatever. also not relevant here.
the rest of the section is nothing special.
minerals are basically not adding much here.

pros first: highly useful in cooking because practical culinary value matters here. efficient energy source because that can be a strength in the right context. helps meals actually work because a fat that people can use well matters more than a theoretical one.

now the downsides: extremely calorie dense by default because that is the unavoidable category burden. easy to overpour without noticing because practical portion creep is real. not a complete food on its own because even the better fats are still just part of a meal.
C tier. Best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
